notes: v0.16.11 — BASTION/LANCE/CHORUS hull detail pass + CHORUS trefoil redesign. BASTION hex tank gained inner armor platform, central command turret, forward sensor canopy, 6 integrated armor wedges, forward weapon ports. LANCE sniper gained 8-vert hull, spine ridge, nose cockpit, 4 outrigger fins, bigger engine block, nose charge port. CHORUS redesigned as a 3-armed trefoil sound platform (was a disc — too similar to BASTION). Speaker horns at each arm tip, central hub with raised rings + dome. All 16 PNGs re-rendered + animated atlas updated. Windows only.
